1.description: get Stavanger municipality bbox and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 land-cover codes within Stavanger bbox to identify agriculture code

3.description: select AR50 polygons classified as agriculture within Stavanger bbox

4.description: select parcels (teig) in Stavanger with geometries and teigid

5.description: find parcels intersecting agriculture AR50 polygons

6.description: get distinct parcel teigid and sort limit 10

args.sql:
SELECT arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833))
GROUP BY arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal
ORDER BY arjordbr;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833))
GROUP BY arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal
ORDER BY arjordbr;

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 agricultural category values within the municipality extent

3.description: select AR50 polygons classified as agricultural within municipality extent

4.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger with teigid and geometry

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teig

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833))
GROUP BY arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal
ORDER BY arjordbr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_Area(omrade)::double precision AS area_m2
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '1103'

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry bbox and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct arjordbr values within municipality bbox

3.description: select AR50 polygons classified as agricultural within municipality bbox (reduced national layer)

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_MakeEnvelope(-42633.16059738374,6564066.379996766,-4877.920349811553,6610354.179999795,25833))
GROUP BY arjordbr, artype, arkartstd, arveget, areal
ORDER BY arjordbr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_Area(omrade)::double precision AS area_m2, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '1103';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
